draft.analysis: Website analysis: Riverside Physio Clinic has strong reviews (4.9/5) but weak booking funnel. Opportunity: review widgets + GBP optimisation.
draft.body:
Hi Riverside,

I came across Riverside Physio Clinic while researching standout clinics in London — your reviews really caught my eye, especially how often customers mention the team by name.

I noticed a couple of quick wins on your website that could help more locals find and book with you:

1. Your Google Business Profile isn't linked to your booking page, so mobile visitors drop off before they can book.
2. The site isn't surfacing your 4.5+ star reviews, which is your strongest conversion asset.

I help local businesses fix exactly this — usually a 2-3 week project with measurable booking uplift. Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call next week?

Best regards,
Ketan Sharma
Digital Growth Consultant
draft.subject: Quick idea for Riverside Physio Clinic's online presence
